title: Optimize Dockerfile by Stripping devDependencies
acceptance_criteria: tsx is moved from devDependencies to dependencies in package.json (entrypoint uses tsx at runtime)
Dockerfile build stage runs `npm prune --omit=dev` after `npm ci` to strip devDeps from node_modules
Docker build succeeds with `docker compose build` (or `docker build .`)
Container starts and entrypoint.sh runs tsx seed scripts without error
Application loads and serves pages after container start
At minimum drizzle-kit (17MB) and @types/* packages are removed from final image
completion_summary: Moved tsx to dependencies, added npm prune --omit=dev to Dockerfile
